hero.name: Khaled Almasri
hero.subtitle: A passionate software developer crafting beautiful web experiences

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me
about.description1: I'm a passionate software developer with a strong foundation in modern web technologies. My journey in tech started with a curiosity about how things work on the internet, which led me to pursue a career in software development.
about.description2: I specialize in building responsive and user-friendly web applications, with expertise in both frontend and backend development. I'm constantly learning and staying up-to-date with the latest technologies to deliver the best solutions.
about.description3: I also have a strong understanding of Artificial Intelligence concepts, including machine learning workflows, data processing, and AI-assisted development. Combined with my hardware and mechatronics background, I bridge the gap between software and physical systems, enabling me to build intelligent, real-world solutions.
about.edu1Desc: Frontend & backend development, APIs, databases, and modern web technologies.
about.edu2Desc: Hardware systems, electronics, automation, troubleshooting, and industrial technology.
about.edu3Title: Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (Self-Study / Practical Experience)
about.edu3Desc: AI fundamentals, model usage, automation, prompt engineering, and AI-assisted development workflows.

e1.title: Full Stack Developer (Training)
e1.desc: Full-stack web development training with focus on modern frameworks, APIs, databases, and AI-assisted development.

e2.title: Mechatronics Technician
e2.desc: Working in automation and mechatronics, maintaining and developing industrial systems and automation technology.

e3.title: Mobile Device Technician (Part-time)
e3.desc: Component-level repair of smartphones and electronics, diagnostics, soldering, and customer service.

e4.title: Mechatronics / Electrical Technician
e4.desc: Electrical installations and mechatronics work for Austrian Federal Railways and industrial construction projects.

e5.title: Owner & Technician
e5.desc: Owned a retail business selling and repairing mobile phones and computers, including satellite and software installations.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Featured Work
projects.description: Here are some of my recent projects that showcase my skills and passion for development.

p1.title: TechWave Shop
p1.desc: A full-stack e-commerce solution for electronics featuring user authentication and product management.

p2.title: Pokémon Card Game
p2.desc: An interactive multiplayer card game built with Vue 3, featuring real-time mechanics and dynamic visual effects.

p3.title: PokéDex Universe
p3.desc: A detailed Pokémon encyclopedia allowing users to explore stats, evolutions, and abilities of their favorite Pokémon.

p4.title: RisPulse
p4.desc: An AI-powered legal assistant platform for searching court decisions, interpreting legal documents, and getting answers to legal questions.

p5.title: LernHeld
p5.desc: A gamified learning platform where users embark on educational adventures, track progress, and level up their knowledge.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? Feel free to reach out. I am always open to discussing new opportunities.
